span.p: Negotiate renewal with incumbent - joint value-creation agenda

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Competitive RFP - include incumbent - weight quality and risk heavily

span.p: Competitive RFQ or e-auction - price-weighted evaluation

span.p: Negotiate on should-cost - use BATNA - market test at next cycle

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Dual-qualify a backup - negotiate continuity terms - minimize auction play

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Consolidate or catalog - minimize transaction cost - no RFP required
